items.title: Track Roy Katmor's response on Orchid round dynamics and new term sheets
items.context: Email from Jake to Roy on May 27: 'Just following up here. Would love to hear the latest on round dynamics.' Roy's May 6 reply noted passing on a TS that didn't align with backers, expecting more in coming weeks.

items.title: Follow up with Simone Garreau on deal materials after in-person meeting
items.context: Jake asked Simone on Apr 28: 'Can you please share the materials for our review?' In-person meeting with Logan at Fin Capital offices occurred May 26. Materials still pending.

items.title: Prep for NYTW CISO Breakfast with Thoropass on June 2
items.context: Calendar event 'HOLD: NYTW / CISO Breakfast' on June 2 at 114 Crosby St with Thoropass team (Claire Lamb, Javier Santin) and Fin Capital investment team.

items.title: Prepare for NYC Tech Week meetings and events (June 1-5)
items.context: Calendar event 'NYC Tech Week' from June 1-5 — all-day event with full investment team. Multiple meetings scheduled including Lunos intro, D-Wave Investor Day, and quarterly catch-ups.
